# About Anusha Ladha

## Overview
Anusha is a 2nd-year Computer Science student at UCLA, passionate about building web applications and exploring new technologies. She has worked with all sorts of people, leveling up her skills and teaming up with smart people.

## Contact
- Email: anushaladha4@g.ucla.edu
- GitHub: https://github.com/anushaladha04
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/anusha-ladha/

State management: Redux.
Animation: Motion.
Version control: Git, GitHub.

## Projects

### Clothesline UCLA
Built an iOS app using Flutter for a campus clothing exchange platform. Implemented custom components and successfully deployed to the iOS App Store. Role: Frontend Developer & Licensing Lead.

### LA Waterkeeper
Partnered with NPO LA Waterkeeper to build a fully scrollable informational site to educate the public on the LA River. Used Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS to develop responsive, accessible frontend pages.

### Agewell

sponsive, accessible frontend pages.

### Agewell Bruins
Building a geriatric virtual assistant to help senior citizens complete daily tasks using Python, Flask, and Firebase. Implementing a conversational memory system with LangChain and ChromaDB to retain context across multiple mic interactions.

### Koshalya
Built a React + Firebase app for a Kathak dance academy of 50+ students to streamline attendance and fee tracking. Automated monthly calculations, reducing payment tracking errors by 80%

ulations, reducing payment tracking errors by 80% and saving several hours of manual work each month.
